title: ** VACATION **
content:
The writer is going on vacation again, dear readers. The writer needs to gather up some strategies to tackle the insignificant problems in the house. There might not be anything new here for a while (which happens quite often lately).

Well, the writer might be back sooner if he's able to find someone to yell at. :D

By the way, the second half of the year has begun. Enjoy it!

 %(me)สะมะ วันไหนไปกินข้าวคน มีคนอยากให้รู้จัก :P%
